name: California Chafee Grant

eligibility.other_requirements: Must be current or former California foster youth; typically emancipated between ages 16-21; enrolled in qualifying CA postsecondary program

stackable_notes: State grant; typically stacks with federal and institutional aid. No displacement expected.
notes: Critical funding source for California foster youth. Advisors should check CSAC for updated age limits — policy has expanded. Must file FAFSA/CADAA.
